items.headline: Micron Stock Is Up 300%. Why Does It Still Trade Cheaper Than Nvidia And Broadcom?
items.summary: Micron stock has surged more than 300% in 2026, but its valuation still trails Nvidia and Broadcom as AI-driven earnings growth reshapes the memory giant.

items.headline: Amazon Stock On Watch As Prime Day Pull-Forward Meets 20% AWS Price Pop
items.summary: BofA keeps AMZN as a Buy with a $310 price target. Strong June retail data and the AWS price increase is expected to boost second-half growth.

items.headline: Forget Nvidia: Kerrisdale Says This Under-The-Radar AI Stock Could Rally 100% Or More
items.summary: Kerrisdale Capital says Regal Rexnord is an overlooked AI infrastructure stock with growing exposure to data centers and robotics, and sees more than 100% upside.

items.headline: Stock Of The Day: Is This The Top For Applied Materials?
items.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) shares are the most overbought that they have ever been. There is a good chance a reversal occurs.

items.headline: Nvidia Isn't The Expensive AI Stock Anymore—AMD, Palantir And ARM Are
items.summary: Nvidia now trades at a lower earnings multiple than AMD, Palantir and Arm, raising questions about how Wall Street is pricing the next phase of the AI boom.

items.headline: Stock Of The Month: Applied Materials Notches Best Rally Since 1975
items.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) jumped about 54% in June — its best month since 1975 — as AI-driven demand lifted earnings estimates and analysts raised price targets.

items.headline: What's Going On With Broadcom Stock Tuesday?
items.summary: AVGO stock gains premarket. Jefferies reiterates Buy rating on Broadcom, pointing to massive long-term custom AI chip growth.

items.headline: What's Going On With Intel Stock Tuesday?
items.summary: Intel stock edges up as Cantor Fitzgerald bumps its price forecast to $150. Read the latest INTC technical and earnings outlook.

items.headline: As AI Fraud Explodes, New Report Says 15 Million Americans Were Scammed Last Year And Americans Lost About $68 Billion
items.summary: Gallup survey shows AI and deepfakes fueled 12% of successful scams in 2025.

items.headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq Futures Gain As Trump Demands Lower Gas Prices 'Immediately'— Vishay Intertechnology, AeroVironment, Nike In Focus (UPDATED)
items.summary: U.S. stock futures declined on Tuesday, as the Dow Jones, Nasdaq 100, and S&P 500 indices fell, following Monday's higher close.

items.headline: IBM, Verizon, Corning And A Health Care Stock On CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
items.summary: Jim Lebenthal recommends Vertex Pharmaceuticals in the healthcare sector. Jenny Van Leeuwen picks Verizon, IBM is down 18%, Joseph Terranova chooses Corning.

items.headline: Warren Buffett Breaks A 20-Year Tradition As Report Says His Gates Foundation Donation Is Suddenly On Hold Over Epstein Files Review
items.summary: Warren Buffett reportedly delays his annual Gates Foundation donation pending a review of the charity's links to Jeffrey Epstein.

items.headline: Why is Moleculin Stock Falling Today?

items.headline: Tema Bets On AI's Next Bottlenecks With New Memory And Photonics ETFs
items.summary: Tema ETFs launches the DISK and LAZR ETFs in partnership with SemiAnalysis, offering exposure to AI memory, photonics, and semiconductor infrastructure.

items.summary: A Benzinga poll asks what percentage of viewers have ever owned Tesla stock. Here are the surprising results.

items.headline: Why Is Rezolve AI Stock Gaining Tuesday?
items.summary: Rezolve AI ($RZLV) shares jump 12% after shareholders approve a $300M buyback program. Get the full details on the stock's rally.

items.headline: AeroVironment Stock Soars As 80% Autonomous Systems Growth Outshines BlueHalo Weakness
items.summary: AeroVironment's AxS delivers 80% year-over-year growth, while BlueHalo portfolio weighs on profits. What does an analyst think?

items.headline: BeOne Medicines Advances Chemotherapy-Free Lymphoma Strategy
items.summary: BeOne Medicines reported positive Phase 3 BRUKINSA data in mantle cell lymphoma, reducing progression or death risk by 43% ahead of planned filings.

items.headline: Sharplink Bought 10,000 ETH, 2 Million SBET: What's Going On?
items.summary: SharpLink buys 10,000 ETH for $16.1M, its first purchase since October, while repurchasing 2.13M shares amid stock weakness.

items.headline: Comcast’s NBCUniversal Spin-Off Increases Potential For Merger With This Telecom Giant
items.summary: Comcast plans to split into two companies, with the spin-off of NBCUniversal. BofA Securities analyst views the decision positively.

items.headline: Sanofi Reports Data From Nexviazyme Study, Says It Meets All Endpoints
items.summary: Sanofi says Nexviazyme met all Phase 3 trial endpoints in infantile Pompe disease, supporting a planned US label expansion filing in 2026.
